title: Select next Python runtime delegate reduction

execplan_profile.projection_rule: canonical_core is authoritative for intent, scope, next action, proof, continuation, and closeout; legacy fields remain compatibility projections.

canonical_core.requested_outcome: Reduce memory.status non-verbose JSON from generated runtime override code to portable operation IR primitives.
canonical_core.hard_constraints: Keep scope bounded to memory.status JSON non-verbose behavior. Preserve verbose/text fallback through explicit package-domain runtime. Do not hand-edit generated outputs.
canonical_core.agent_may_decide: Add a small generic TOML-table counting primitive and operation IR composition if tests prove parity.
canonical_core.escalate_when: Status behavior requires memory package policy beyond deterministic target-root, TOML table counting, payload assembly, and JSON/text emission.
canonical_core.next_action: Implement memory.status JSON non-verbose with portable primitives, regenerate outputs, validate, and close this slice.
completion_criteria: memory.status JSON non-verbose no longer depends on the generated _load_memory_bootstrap_status TOML-table override; it executes through portable operation IR primitives with verbose/text fallback still explicit.

execution_run.what happened: memory.status non-verbose JSON was moved from a generated memory_runtime TOML-table override into portable operation IR using path.target_root.resolve, toml.table.counts, payload.assemble, and output.emit; verbose/text status still uses the explicit package runtime fallback.
execution_run.scope touched: command-generation primitive executor/tests, memory.status operation contract, adapter/command-package/inventory contracts, generated memory/typescript projections, generated-package proof guard, and planning surfaces
execution_run.changed surfaces: portable primitive catalog and schemas, generated memory status operation, generated memory runtime facade, generated TypeScript metadata, and python-operation execution inventory
execution_run.validations run: pytest primitive executor; contract tooling; generated command packages; generated Python conformance; primitive conformance; primitive Docker conformance; generated package Node/Docker/Docker-conformance; focused memory status tests; root CLI authority proof
execution_run.result for continuation: memory.status JSON compact behavior is no longer generic deterministic runtime debt; continue #892 with the next safe runtime delegate reduction.
execution_run.next step: Select another bounded runtime delegate candidate.

proof_report.validation proof: uv run pytest tests/test_command_generation_primitive_executor.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_contract_tooling_surfaces.py --quiet-success; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --python-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --primitive-conformance; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --primitive-docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --conformance --require-node; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker --require-docker; uv run python scripts/check/check_generated_command_packages.py --docker-conformance --require-docker; uv run pytest packages/memory/tests/test_report.py::test_memory_lifecycle_status_defaults_to_tiny_actions packages/memory/tests/test_report.py::test_memory_lifecycle_tiny_does_not_collect_full_status -q; uv run agentic-workspace defaults --section root_cli_authority --format json
proof_report.proof achieved now: memory.status JSON compact path executes through portable operation IR primitives and generated package proof is green
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: generated/memory/python/operations/memory.status.report.json contains toml.table.counts and payload.assemble; generated/memory/python/primitives/memory_runtime.py no longer contains a status JSON fast-path override.

closure_check.accepted values: Accepted values: slice status = complete|completed|bounded slice complete; larger-intent status = closed|complete|completed for archive-and-close or open|partial|unfinished for archive-but-keep-lane-open; closure decision = archive-and-close|archive-but-keep-lane-open. Prefer `agentic-planning archive-plan <plan> --prepare-closeout` before hand-editing closeout fields.
closure_check.why this decision is honest: The bounded memory.status JSON compact path moved to portable primitives, but the wider #892 runtime-delegate epic still has other domain-runtime and compatibility fallbacks.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: toml.table.counts is now a codegen-owned primitive with schema and Docker conformance; memory.status verbose/text fallback remains explicit package-domain debt.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen only if memory.status compact JSON regresses to generated runtime override or package runtime import.

improvement_signal_review.guidance: At closeout, separate acted-on, reported-only/routed, and dismissed incidental findings; keep this compact and evidence-backed.
